title: Tricarpelema thomsonii
taxonomy: Tricarpelema thomsonii is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. It belongs to the genus Tricarpelema, which is a small group of plants native to the Indian subcontinent. The species is further classified as Tricarpelema thomsonii, with some sources placing it in the synonymy of Tricarpelema glandulosum. However, this classification may vary depending on the source and ongoing taxonomic research. Further study is needed to confirm the exact classification of Tricarpelema thomsonii.
